description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving and cabinet unit with a modern, minimalist design. The structure features a combination of light wood and black finishes, with the top and bottom sections enclosed by doors and the middle section open with two shelves. The upper compartment has a single door with a small handle, while the lower section has double doors, also with handles, providing concealed storage. The open shelves in the center are supported by a black metal frame, with a cross-brace at the back for added stability. The legs are slender and black, elevating the unit off the ground and giving it a contemporary look suitable for urban interiors or garages.
description: A tall, modern shelving and cabinet unit with light wood doors and black metal framing, featuring both open shelves and enclosed storage compartments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the light wood doors on the top and bottom, open black shelves in the middle, and visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the slim profile of the unit, with the doors and handles visible at the front edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black metal frame, cross-brace for stability, and the back panels of the lower compartment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and structure of the shelves and the side profile of the doors.
